asset_name: Speech Bubble — Seed Request Icon (for Hungry state)

context.usage: Shows above Echo when hungry; contains seed icon.

acceptance_criteria: Bubble is exactly 20x16px with a 1px border (#1D2B53) and solid fill (#FFF1E8).
Tail points downward-left and stays inside bounds; tip pixel is at (6,15).
Centered seed icon fits in a 12x12 area and uses only #FFEC27 and #AB5236 (outline may use #1D2B53).

reference_images.label: care_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Feed, clean, and pet interaction timing plus UI icon anchor.

reference_images.label: hud_widget_doc
reference_images.purpose: Bottom HUD layout, care popup placement, and touch-safe spacing anchor.

reference_images.label: seed_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Seed shape, bowl fill states, and feed interaction prop anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for ui asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/seed_request_bubble_icon.png through AssetServer and store the handle under seed_request_bubble_icon.
runtime_notes: Anchor UI sprites in screen space inside the 128x128 logical canvas and clamp to whole pixels before render.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
